race.comment: REDWINELOVER (5) has been about the mark without saluting in recent runs over longer trips. Last raced at something like today's journey in February and won by nearly five at Kingscote. Three-time winner at this distance and she can return to winning ways now that she is back in her comfort zone. IRISH BLISS (7) resumes. Generally races over a bit more ground but looks ready for a smart return after winning a recent Donald jump-out. Draws the inside alley which helps the cause. DOUGIE'S DREAM (6) is back from an 11-month spell. Opened the last campaign off a substantial lay-off with a fine second over this trip at Bendigo. Will race handy from the good gate and is sure to be competitive. TATSU (1) returns from a ten-week absence. In the money at three of five first-up runs. This is short of his best trip but a top four finish is on the cards. HIMENO (3) has not raced since winning on debut on Australia Day. Untapped talent who must be respected.
